# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Publish Release
on:
  push:
    tags:
      - '*'
jobs:
  publish:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      
      # Install and Build (if necessary)
      - name: Set up Node.js environment
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: 14
          
      - run: npm ci
        
      - run: npm run build
      
      # Create Release and Publish to npm
      - name: Publish to npm
        run: |
          echo "//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${{secrets.NPM_TOKEN}}" > .npmrc
          npm publish
        
  # Create Release and Publish to PyPI (not implemented)
